instruction: Return only Rust code. Define a public Payment struct with public fields from, to, amount, and nonce. Also define a free function validate_payment(payment: &Payment) -> Result<(), String> that rejects blank addresses and zero amount.

Return only Rust code. Define a public LedgerHeader struct with public fields height, previous_hash, and timestamp_ms. Also define a free function next_ledger_height(parent: &LedgerHeader) -> Option<u64> using checked_add.
Return only Rust code. Define pub fn storage_fee(byte_count: usize, fee_per_byte: u64) -> Option<u64> that converts byte_count to u64 and uses checked multiplication.
Return only Rust code. Using std::collections::HashSet, define pub fn remember_transaction(seen: &mut HashSet<String>, tx_id: String) -> bool that returns true only for a new transaction id.
Return only Rust code. Define a public tuple struct CoinAmount(u64) with constructors and checked arithmetic: new, as_u64, checked_add, and checked_sub.
Return only Rust code. Define pub fn parse_coin_amount(input: &str) -> Result<u64, String> that trims whitespace, rejects empty input, and parses a u64.
Return only Rust code. Define pub fn debit_balance(balance: u64, amount: u64) -> Result<u64, String> that uses checked_sub and returns an error when funds are insufficient.
Return only Rust code. Using std::collections::HashMap, define pub fn get_balance(balances: &HashMap<String, u64>, account: &str) -> u64 that returns zero for missing accounts.

Return only Rust code. Define a public SignedTransaction struct with fields id, signer, payload_hash, and signature. Also define a free function has_signature(tx: &SignedTransaction) -> bool that checks signer and signature are not blank.
Return only Rust code. Define pub fn validate_nonce(expected: u64, actual: u64) -> Result<(), String> that succeeds only when actual equals expected.
